---
name: Skill / Integration Request
about: Request a new skill or MCP server integration
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

**Service/API**
What service or API should ZBOT integrate with? (e.g., Notion, Linear, Stripe)

**Use case**
What would you use this integration for?

**API documentation**
Link to the service's API docs if available.

**MCP server available?**
Is there an existing MCP server for this service? (Check https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers)

If an MCP server exists, you can add it yourself with zero code — see the [MCP bridge docs](https://github.com/ziloss-tech/zbot#mcp-bridge-zapier-replacement) in the README.
